message:
refactor(vc_tui): remove legacy ratatui/crossterm render path, go ftui-only

Complete the migration from ratatui to ftui by removing every legacy
render function and the crossterm input handler from all 12 screen
modules, lib.rs, theme.rs, and widgets.rs.

Key changes:
- Drop `ratatui` and `crossterm` workspace dependencies from root
  Cargo.toml and crates/vc_tui/Cargo.toml; update Cargo.lock (-5 209
  lines net).
- Remove `render_<screen>()` public functions from every screen module
  (overview, machines, accounts, sessions, mail, alerts, guardian,
  oracle, events, beads, rch, settings) and their re-exports in
  screens/mod.rs and lib.rs.
- Remove `App::render()` (ratatui Frame dispatcher) and
  `App::handle_key()` (crossterm KeyEvent handler) from lib.rs, along
  with all associated unit tests (quit, tab/backtab navigation,
  shortcuts, escape).
- Strip legacy `RatatuiColor` fields and bridge helpers from Theme
  (`bg_primary`, `bg_secondary`, `healthy`, `warning`, `critical`,
  `info`, `muted`, `text`, `accent`, `highlight`, `border`, `claude`,
  `codex`, `gemini`), remove `health_color_ratatui()`,
  `provider_color_ratatui()`, and the private `legacy_color()` converter.
- Remove ratatui-specific tests (`test_theme_default_legacy_palette_matches_dark_defaults`,
  `test_health_color_ratatui_matches_legacy_palette`,
  `test_provider_color_ratatui_matches_legacy_palette`).
- Update doc comments in widgets.rs and theme.rs to reflect ftui as the
  sole rendering backend.

The ftui Elm-architecture path (Model trait, `run_with_options`) is now
the only code path; no ratatui imports remain in vc_tui.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
